info.name: TelephoneManager API
info.description: API collection for testing TelephoneManager backend endpoints

body.raw:
{
  "name": "John Doe Updated",
  "email": "john.doe@company.com",
  "role": "USER",
  "department": "IT",
  "position": "Senior Developer",
  "status": "ACTIVE",
  "phone": "+1234567890",
  "address": "123 Main St, City",
  "manager": "Jane Smith"
}

item.name: Get All Phones (Admin/Assigner only)
item.description: Only Admin and Assigner can access this endpoint.

item.name: Get Phone by ID (Admin/Assigner/Assigned User)
item.description: Admin and Assigner can access any phone. User can only access their assigned phone.

item.name: Get My Phone (User only)
item.description: User: Replace {{myPhoneId}} with the ID of your assigned phone.

item.name: Create Phone (Admin only)
item.description: Only Admin can create phones.

item.name: Update Phone (Admin only)
item.description: Only Admin can update phones.

item.name: Delete Phone (Admin only)
item.description: Only Admin can delete phones.

item.name: Assign Phone to User (Admin/Assigner only)
item.description: Assign a phone to a specific user. Only Admin and Assigner can perform this action.

item.name: Unassign Phone from User (Admin/Assigner only)
item.description: Unassign a phone from its current user. Only Admin and Assigner can perform this action.

item.name: Transfer Phone to Another User (Admin/Assigner only)
item.description: Transfer a phone from current user to another user. Only Admin and Assigner can perform this action.

item.name: Get All SIM Cards (Admin/Assigner only)
item.description: Only Admin and Assigner can access this endpoint.

item.name: Get SIM Card by ID (Admin/Assigner/Assigned User)
item.description: Admin and Assigner can access any SIM card. User can only access their assigned SIM card.

item.name: Get My SIM Card (User only)
item.description: User: Replace {{mySimCardId}} with the ID of your assigned SIM card.

item.name: Create SIM Card (Admin only)
item.description: Only Admin can create SIM cards.

item.name: Update SIM Card (Admin only)
item.description: Only Admin can update SIM cards.

item.name: Delete SIM Card (Admin only)
item.description: Only Admin can delete SIM cards.

item.name: Assign SIM Card to User (Admin/Assigner only)
item.description: Assign a SIM card to a specific user. Only Admin and Assigner can perform this action.

item.name: Unassign SIM Card from User (Admin/Assigner only)
item.description: Unassign a SIM card from its current user. Only Admin and Assigner can perform this action.

item.name: Transfer SIM Card to Another User (Admin/Assigner only)
item.description: Transfer a SIM card from current user to another user. Only Admin and Assigner can perform this action.

item.name: Get Phone Assignment History
item.description: Get assignment/transfer history for a phone by ID.

item.name: Get SIM Card Assignment History
item.description: Get assignment/transfer history for a SIM card by ID.

item.name: Get User Assignment History
item.description: Get assignment/transfer history for a user by ID.

item.name: Get Dashboard Overview (Admin/Assigner only)
item.description: Get overall dashboard statistics including totals, assignments, and recent activity.

item.name: Get Phone Statistics (Admin/Assigner only)
item.description: Get detailed phone statistics including status distribution, brand distribution, and assignment rates.

item.name: Get SIM Card Statistics (Admin/Assigner only)
item.description: Get detailed SIM card statistics including status distribution and assignment rates.

item.name: Get User Statistics (Admin/Assigner only)
item.description: Get user statistics including role distribution, department distribution, and assignment counts.

item.name: Get Recent Activity (Admin/Assigner only)
item.description: Get recent assignment, transfer, and activity history.

item.name: Get System Alerts (Admin/Assigner only)
item.description: Get system alerts for items needing attention (damaged phones, blocked SIMs, multiple assignments).

item.name: Get User Notifications
item.description: Get notifications for the current user with pagination.

item.name: Get Unread Notifications Count
item.description: Get count of unread notifications for current user.

item.name: Mark Notification as Read
item.description: Mark a specific notification as read.

item.name: Mark All Notifications as Read
item.description: Mark all notifications as read for current user.

item.name: Delete Notification
item.description: Delete a specific notification.

item.name: Send Notification (Admin/Assigner only)
item.description: Send a notification to specific users. Only Admin and Assigner can send notifications.

item.name: Send Real-Time Notification (Test)
item.description: Trigger a real-time notification for userId 1. Subscribe to /queue/notifications/1 in a WebSocket client to see the result.

item.name: Send Notification to User (Test)
item.description: Send notification to user with ID 1.

item.name: Send Notification to All Admins (Test)
item.description: Send notification to all admins.

item.name: Send Notification to All Assigners (Test)
item.description: Send notification to all assigners.

item.name: Get Audit Logs (Admin only)
item.description: Get audit logs with filtering and pagination. Only Admin can access audit logs.

item.name: Get User Audit Logs (Admin only)
item.description: Get audit logs for a specific user. Only Admin can access.

item.name: Get Entity Audit Logs (Admin only)
item.description: Get audit logs for a specific entity (phone, simcard, user). Only Admin can access.

item.name: Get Audit Log Summary (Admin only)
item.description: Get audit log statistics and summary. Only Admin can access.

item.name: Export Audit Logs (Admin only)
item.description: Export audit logs to CSV format. Only Admin can access.

item.name: Get User Settings
item.description: Get user settings for a specific user. Creates default settings if none exist.

item.name: Update User Settings

body.raw:
{
  "theme": "dark",
  "language": "fr",
  "timezone": "Europe/Paris",
  "dateFormat": "dd/MM/yyyy",
  "timeFormat": "HH:mm",
  "notificationsEnabled": true,
  "emailNotifications": true,
  "smsNotifications": false,
  "pushNotifications": true,
  "autoRefreshInterval": 60,
  "pageSize": 20,
  "showHelpTooltips": true,
  "compactMode": false,
  "sidebarCollapsed": false,
  "dashboardLayout": "grid"
}

item.description: Update user settings for a specific user.

item.name: Delete User Settings
item.description: Delete user settings for a specific user.

item.name: Reset User Settings to Defaults
item.description: Reset user settings to default values.

item.name: Update Theme
item.description: Update user theme preference.

item.name: Update Language
item.description: Update user language preference.

item.name: Update Timezone
item.description: Update user timezone preference.

item.name: Update Notification Settings
item.description: Update user notification preferences.

item.name: Update Page Size
item.description: Update user page size preference.

item.name: Get All System Settings
item.description: Get all system settings with pagination. Admin only.

item.name: Get System Setting by ID
item.description: Get system setting by ID. Admin only.

item.name: Get System Setting by Key
item.description: Get system setting by key. Admin only.

item.name: Get System Setting Value
item.description: Get system setting value by key. Admin and Assigner can access.

item.name: Create System Setting
item.description: Create a new system setting. Admin only.

item.name: Update System Setting
item.description: Update system setting by ID. Admin only.

item.name: Update System Setting by Key
item.description: Update system setting value by key. Admin only.

item.name: Delete System Setting
item.description: Delete system setting by ID. Admin only.

item.name: Delete System Setting by Key
item.description: Delete system setting by key. Admin only.

item.name: Get Settings by Category
item.description: Get system settings by category. Admin only.

item.name: Get Settings by Category (List)
item.description: Get system settings by category as list. Admin only.

item.name: Get Editable Settings
item.description: Get editable system settings. Admin only.

item.name: Search Settings by Key
item.description: Search system settings by key. Admin only.

item.name: Search Settings by Description
item.description: Search system settings by description. Admin only.

item.name: Get All Categories
item.description: Get all system setting categories. Admin only.

item.name: Check Setting Exists
item.description: Check if system setting exists by key. Admin only.

item.name: Upload File
item.description: Upload a file with metadata. All authenticated users can upload files.

item.name: Download File
item.description: Download a file by ID. All authenticated users can download files.

item.name: Get File Info
item.description: Get file information by ID. All authenticated users can access.

item.name: Get All Files
item.description: Get all files with pagination. Admin and Assigner can access.

item.name: Get Files by Upload Type
item.description: Get files by upload type. Admin and Assigner can access.

item.name: Get Files by User
item.description: Get files uploaded by a specific user. All authenticated users can access.

item.name: Get Files by Related Entity
item.description: Get files related to a specific entity. All authenticated users can access.

item.name: Get Public Files
item.description: Get public files. All authenticated users can access.

item.name: Search Files by File Name
item.description: Search files by file name. Admin and Assigner can access.

item.name: Search Files by Original Name
item.description: Search files by original name. Admin and Assigner can access.

item.name: Search Files by Description
item.description: Search files by description. Admin and Assigner can access.

item.name: Get Files by Content Type
item.description: Get files by content type. Admin and Assigner can access.

item.name: Get Files by File Extension
item.description: Get files by file extension. Admin and Assigner can access.

item.name: Get Files by Size Range
item.description: Get files by size range. Admin and Assigner can access.

item.name: Delete File
item.description: Delete a file by ID. Admin and Assigner can delete files.

item.name: Update File Metadata
item.description: Update file metadata. All authenticated users can update their own files.

item.name: Get File Statistics by User
item.description: Get file statistics for a specific user. All authenticated users can access.

item.name: Get File Count by Upload Type
item.description: Get file count by upload type. Admin and Assigner can access.

item.name: Get All Upload Types
item.description: Get all available upload types. All authenticated users can access.

item.name: Get All Content Types
item.description: Get all content types. Admin and Assigner can access.

item.name: Get All File Extensions
item.description: Get all file extensions. Admin and Assigner can access.

item.name: Export Users to CSV (Admin/Assigner only)
item.description: Export users data to CSV/Excel/JSON. Query: department, status, format. Auth: Admin/Assigner.

item.name: Export Phones to CSV (Admin/Assigner only)
item.description: Export phones data to CSV/Excel/JSON. Query: status, brand, condition, format. Auth: Admin/Assigner.

item.name: Export SIM Cards to CSV (Admin/Assigner only)
item.description: Export SIM cards data to CSV/Excel/JSON. Query: status, carrier, format. Auth: Admin/Assigner.

item.name: Export Attributions to CSV (Admin/Assigner only)
item.description: Export attributions data to CSV/Excel/JSON. Query: status, startDate, endDate, format. Auth: Admin/Assigner.

item.name: Export Requests to CSV (Admin/Assigner only)
item.description: Export requests data to CSV/Excel/JSON. Query: status, type, priority, startDate, endDate, format. Auth: Admin/Assigner.

item.name: Get Latest Stats
item.description: Get phone usage statistics for phone with ID 1. Replace '1' with the desired phone ID.

item.name: Get Phone Usage Stats
item.description: Get phone usage statistics for phone with ID 1. Replace '1' with the desired phone ID.

item.name: Get Phone Maintenance History
item.description: Get phone maintenance history for phone with ID 1. Replace '1' with the desired phone ID.

item.name: Request Maintenance (User)
item.description: User requests maintenance for phone with ID 1. Replace '1' with the desired phone ID.
